We are putting pro-worker policies in place to provide the largest wage growth in 60 years, while ensuring savings for our seniors.

From passport renewals and issues with Social Security to planning your next trip to Washington, DC, my office is here to serve you!

The people of NC-03 deserve accessible representation in Congress.

Players need competition. Sometimes you have to lose. It pushes people to do things they may never have thought they could do because they had to work harder. Competition breeds excellence. Ask Michael Jordan how he became the GOAT. He got cut and got motivated.
